plugins.name: sommelier
plugins.description: Verification-gated orchestration skills (PRD + file-scoped parallel tickets, tier-paired, evidence-gated). Self-tested across six rounds, all published: verification rule (digest) beats placebo at catching certified bugs (0%->44% (sonnet) / 29% (haiku), hidden-tests, sonnet p~6e-8); tier-routing ~19% cheaper than all-Opus; parallel ~1.75x slower (single run) on small tasks; Round 6 shipped-text probe nulled at the ceiling (published; 0/200 negative controls broken).
